summary: Completed Iteration 8 testing of MemoraAI SaaS Landing Page. All features verified: Dark blue theme (#0a0e27), hero section with 'Your WhatsApp Now Thinks, Remembers & Sells.' headline, animated WhatsApp mockup, navbar with green 'Talk to MemoraAI' and purple 'Start Free Demo' buttons, 16 industry cards, 10 feature cards, 4 pricing plans (Starter, Growth, Premium, Enterprise), final CTA 'Your Competitor Replies. You Remember.', floating WhatsApp button, counter stats (5,000+, 92%, 38%). Industry pages (/industry/real-estate, /industry/astrology, /industry/hospital) load correctly with WhatsApp demo mockups showing animated conversations. Backend APIs all working. Login and dashboard access verified.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all landing page and industry page features working)

seed_data_creation: Industries auto-seeded on first API call to /api/memoraai/industries/public (16 industries)
context_for_next_testing_agent: MemoraAI Iteration 8 Landing Page testing complete. All features verified: 1) Landing page (/) with dark blue theme (#0a0e27 = rgb(10, 14, 39)). 2) Hero section with headline 'Your WhatsApp Now Thinks, Remembers & Sells.' and animated WhatsApp mockup showing RealApex Properties conversation. 3) Navbar with 'Talk to MemoraAI' (green #25D366) and 'Start Free Demo' (purple gradient) buttons. 4) Industries section with 16 industry cards (Real Estate, Hospitals/Clinics, Astrology/Numerology, Salons, Gyms, Car Rentals, Function Halls, Restaurants, Education, Lawyers, Finance, Ecommerce, Retail, Construction, Agriculture, Software). 5) Features section with 10 feature cards (Memory Engine, Emotional AI, Lead Qualification, Auto Follow-up, Appointment Booking, Smart Campaigns, Voice+Text, Multi-Agent Dashboard, Analytics, Self-Learning AI). 6) Pricing section with 4 plans (Starter Free/14 days, Growth Rs.2,999/month, Premium Rs.7,999/month, Enterprise Custom). 7) Final CTA 'Your Competitor Replies. You Remember.' 8) Floating WhatsApp button. 9) Counter stats (5,000+ Leads Automated, 92% Faster Replies, 38% Higher Conversion). Industry pages use dynamic route /industry/:slug with WhatsApp demo mockups. Login: /login -> 'Login with Password' -> phone=8888888888, password=admin123 -> redirects to /dashboard.
